response.justification: Highly experienced full-stack engineer with 15+ years across web, backend, and tooling, strong TypeScript/Node.js/React background, AI-agent and MCP exposure at re:cinq, and a clear craftsmanship orientation (TDD, pairing, trunk-based development). Meets or exceeds most required skills; gaps are narrow (Nest.js, Vitest, Kotlin, Python) and reasonable to close on the job.
strengths: Deep TypeScript/Node.js + React experience plus current AI-agent/MCP work
Strong engineering discipline: TDD, CI/CD, code reviews, teaching/workshops
Broad polyglot background (Java, DLang, C/C++, PHP) and cloud/Docker exposure
concerns: No explicit Nest.js or Vitest experience listed
Kotlin and Python missing from declared skills
PostgreSQL not mentioned (MongoDB/MySQL only); cloud experience skewed to AWS CDK
